stories.title: 'Every team has to go through a little chaos': How...
stories.summary: The New York Knicks, after 53 years of waiting, are finally NBA champions again. Here's why their path to glory wasn't easy.

stories.title: Knicks cap brilliant run with long-awaited NBA tit...
stories.summary: Jalen Brunson scored 45 in Game 5, powering yet another Knicks rally over the Spurs for New York's first NBA title since 1973.

stories.title: Wemby: Losing in Finals 'biggest lesson of my life...
stories.summary: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama said he's "not running away" from the pain of losing to the Knicks in the NBA Finals, calling the experience "the biggest learning moment" of his life.

stories.title: Euphoric fans celebrate Knicks' title across NYC
stories.summary: It was bedlam on Broadway as the New York Knicks won their first NBA championship in 53 years on Saturday night.

stories.title: Former defensive lineman Aldon Smith dies at 36
stories.summary: Aldon Smith, who played six seasons in the NFL with the 49ers, Raiders and Cowboys, died on Saturday at age 36.
